violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): One bucket for wiping cloths noted with no sanitizer.
SINGLE - USE/SINGLE - SERVICE ARTICLES (1 pts): Single service noted being stored on floor.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Holes in walls noted in need of repair. Some areas of floor need reseal. Three ceiling tiles noted missing in back hallway need install.
SANITIZATION OF EQUIP. AND UTENSILS (4 pts): The chemicals for the sanitizing rinse noted not being automatically dispensed. Service company contacted at this time.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): Employee noted working in food prep area not properly restraining facial hair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some walls in kitchen and utility room noted with holes need repair. Three ceiling tiles missing need installation.
PREMISES (1 pts): Wet mops noted in utility sink to be hung up.
